goal: Recommend resource optimization and suggest closing high-memory application instances.

plan_steps.description: Get current CPU and memory usage.
Research common causes and solutions for high CPU usage.

parameters.query: how to reduce high CPU usage windows 10

plan_steps.description: Research how to identify and close high-memory applications.

parameters.query: how to find and close memory intensive applications windows 10

plan_steps.description: Open Task Manager to view running processes and their resource usage.
Inform Pratik about the resource optimization recommendations and suggest closing high-memory applications.

parameters.message_text: High CPU usage detected. I recommend reviewing running applications and closing any memory-intensive ones. You can use Task Manager (Ctrl+Shift+Esc) to identify these. I'm also researching common solutions for high CPU usage.

goal: Recommend resource optimization and suggest closing high-memory application instances.

plan_steps.description: Get current CPU and memory usage to assess the situation.
Identify and list processes consuming significant memory.
Inform the user about high resource usage and provide recommendations.

parameters.message_text: High CPU usage detected (96.3%). Memory usage is at 70.8%. To optimize, please close applications with high memory consumption. The following applications are currently using the most memory: [list of processes from step 2].

goal: Recommend resource optimization and suggest closing high-memory application instances.

plan_steps.description: Get a screenshot of the current screen to analyze running applications.
Analyze the screenshot to identify running applications and their memory usage.

parameters.text: Analyze the screenshot to identify running applications and their memory usage. Focus on identifying applications with high memory consumption given the context of a 100% CPU alert and 70.9% memory load.

plan_steps.description: Based on the identified high-memory applications, suggest specific resource optimization strategies and recommend closing instances of these applications. The CPU alert at 100% suggests a need for immediate action.

parameters.description: Given a 100% CPU alert and 70.9% memory load, and a list of running applications with their memory usage (to be provided by the screen_process analysis), provide recommendations for resource optimization. Specifically, identify which high-memory applications should be closed to alleviate the load.

goal: Recommend resource optimization and suggest closing high-memory application instances.

plan_steps.description: Get a list of currently running applications and their memory usage.
Identify applications consuming significant memory.
Suggest closing high-memory applications to free up resources.

goal: Offer dynamic assistant help to Pratik Sir for: 'The IP Prime application has a pending update, indicated by the 'Restart to Update' button at the top right. Additionally, there are 4 unread system notifications visible on the Windows taskbar.'. Recommendation: 'Offer to assist with restarting the IP Prime application to apply the update. Also, ask if the user would like to review the system notifications.'

plan_steps.description: Send a message to Pratik Sir offering to restart the IP Prime application and inquire about system notifications.

parameters.message_text: Hello Pratik Sir, I noticed that the IP Prime application has a pending update. Would you like me to restart it to apply the update? Also, I see there are 4 unread system notifications on your taskbar. Would you like me to help you review them?
